programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Love, Money and Death
programme.desc: After popular American University accounting professor Sue Ann Marcum is killed, police suspect one-time stock broker and Juarez, Mexico native Jorge Rueda Landeros is responsible.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sisters in Death
programme.desc: After his high-school aged daughters disobey him by dating, a strict father allegedly kills them.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Bad Cop
programme.desc: A former police officer stalked, assaulted, and attempted to seduce young women and was arrested while looking for sex with minor girls on internet chatrooms. He serves time but flees while out on parole.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Cliff Home
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a technologically advanced, solar-heated house on a cliff overlooking the vast plains of Colorado. Their Passive Plus home includes solar, passive solar, septic and water catchment technology ideal for off-grid living.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Earth Home
programme.desc: A young couple sets out to build their dream home together in a remote canyon just north of Yellowstone National Park in Montana. They create a timeless, earthen home suited for their challenging climate.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Cliff Home
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a technologically advanced, solar-heated house on a cliff overlooking the vast plains of Colorado. Their Passive Plus home includes solar, passive solar, septic and water catchment technology ideal for off-grid living.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mayan City of Blood
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, the lost city of Chichen Itza contains ancient secrets of a mysterious civilization. Follow the scientists working to find how the city of Chichen Itza was built, and how the bloody rite of human sacrifice shaped the city.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets at the Palace
programme.desc: We reveal the centuries-old secrets and mysteries of one of the most remarkable examples of Victorian engineering. Follow the cutting-edge technology that built the Palace of Westminster, and find how it paved the way for today's skyscrapers.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is the biggest man-made structure on the planet and one of its biggest mysteries. Follow the scientific mission to reveal the ancient secrets of one of history's greatest empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Theresa on Tour
programme.desc: We join Theresa on the road on her incredible cross-country tour. In city after city she delivers healing messages, but this time, she's going from sold-out crowds to an empty house, now that Larry has moved out.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Five Star Readings
programme.desc: Theresa gives readings to Debbie Gibson, John Schneider from 'Dukes of Hazzard,' Anne Burrell, Dorit Kemsley from 'Real Housewives of Beverly Hills' and Jonathan Lipnicki of 'Jerry Maguire.'

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Mobile Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: This Christmas, the Waldrops aren't decking the halls -- they're going stir-crazy inside the mobile home walls! They have to get a tree, visit Santa and try to keep Christmas special for the kids. Courtney also opens up about her postpartum hair loss.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Back to the Farm: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Matt surprises Amy with an offer to buy the north side of the farm, but she struggles to meet his deadline. Zach and Tori plan for a low-key Christmas as they adjust to life with baby Lilah, but Matt makes sure Jackson has the full holiday experience.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Tumbles and Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Waldrops must evacuate the mobile home when a tornado touches down nearby. A school is destroyed during the tornado, so the boys hold a fundraiser to help the teachers. The babies compete in the First Annual Waldrop Sixtathlon with help from the boys.

programme.title: The Little Couple: I Love Candy!
programme.desc: When one of Jen's best friends from school come to visit for the weekend, Zoey and Will love the time to bond with the children.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Back to the Farm: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Matt surprises Amy with an offer to buy the north side of the farm, but she struggles to meet his deadline. Zach and Tori plan for a low-key Christmas as they adjust to life with baby Lilah, but Matt makes sure Jackson has the full holiday experience.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Tumbles and Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Waldrops must evacuate the mobile home when a tornado touches down nearby. A school is destroyed during the tornado, so the boys hold a fundraiser to help the teachers. The babies compete in the First Annual Waldrop Sixtathlon with help from the boys.

programme.title: The Little Couple: I Love Candy!
programme.desc: When one of Jen's best friends from school come to visit for the weekend, Zoey and Will love the time to bond with the children.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Dear Santa, I Love You
programme.desc: It's Christmas time and Bill goes all out with the decorations much to Jen's dismay.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Let's Go in the Snow!
programme.desc: The boys throw caution to the wind as Will and Zoey experience snow for the first time in Vermont.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, 'Honeymoon in Vegas.' Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 10 Years Later and Busier Than Ever!
programme.desc: Brides and viewers have been 'saying yes' for 10 incredible years. When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and consultant Shay have a dress disagreement. Then, bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: It's a Little Awkward
programme.desc: Jeremy and Audrey want a low-key gender reveal party, but family tensions may interfere. Zach's serious illness hits home all the hardships his child may face in the future. Amy pursues a different business venture, and Matt tackles a BIG project.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: He'll Be Whoever He's Meant to Be
programme.desc: On the eve of their baby shower, Tori and Zach find out whether or not their son has dwarfism. Jeremy and Audrey face a new hurdle after finding their dream home. Matt helps with the nursery; Amy and Chris have a serious talk about their size difference.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: A Holistic Discovery
programme.desc: After months of stubborn ailments, Yesica visits a holistic healer who discovers a baby's heartbeat. Later that night, she gives birth to a premature baby boy.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby and a Girdle
programme.desc: After a complicated pregnancy including a bout with Bell's Palsy, Victoria struggles to lose her baby weight. Never suspecting the real reason behind her extra pounds, she suddenly goes into labour at her mother-in-law's house.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in a Tornado
programme.desc: Kayla goes to a small town clinic with terrible cramps and learns that she is pregnant and in labour.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in the Bowl
programme.desc: Dragica just lost the weight from her first pregnancy, and is shocked when she gives birth to a baby in the toilet.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Leprechaun
programme.desc: Mandy's alcohol theme keeps her reception guests happy, while Lindsey finds a leprechaun and spares no expense to impress her crowd.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Thousand Cranes
programme.desc: Lori has hung a thousand origami cranes inside an intimate flower shop and Rita rocks a pink leopard print dress.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Blingtastic Baptism
programme.desc: A couple who married as teens now get married in a traditional gypsy wedding.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: 14 and Looking for Mr. Right
programme.desc: Priscilla, a 14-year-old Gypsy girl, is a fully trained Gypsy wife who is looking for a husband.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A VCR for Every Day of the Week
programme.desc: John and Joe are a father and son duo who both hoard. John faces jail time for his compulsions, while Joe could lose his newborn son to child protective services if they don't clean up their mess.

programme.title: Movie: She's All That
programme.desc: An athlete bets his friend that he can transform a geeky girl into a beautiful prom queen.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Where Have You Been?
programme.desc: An explosive family brawl leaves Jade caught between Sean and her parents. DeVoin's family reappears in Briana and Nova's lives after being absent for years. Kailyn tries to connect with her sister.

programme.desc: College student Brad Perry showed up to work his graveyard shift at the gas station and was never seen alive again.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Secret
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl goes missing in a small Kentucky town. Two weeks later, she is found strangled in the woods.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: She Never Came Home
programme.desc: The case of a gruesome stabbing death of a bullied teenager remains unsolved for 27 years--until a rookie cold case detective sees a new clue in an old crime scene photo.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Cross Country Connection/ Eyes at the Window
programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. A cold case murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns into a jailhouse snitch.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Shannon Siders' body was found in the woods, nearly everyone in the small town of Newaygo, Michigan, becomes a suspect. It takes 22 years for a special cold case unit to solve the crime.

programme.title: The First 48: Killer Contact
programme.desc: When a young man is found shot dead in his van, Tulsa Homicide retraces his final hours and gets caught up in a web of lies.

programme.title: The First 48: Fit of Rage/ Mean Streets
programme.desc: In Cincinnati, Det. Jenny Luke and Det. Bob Randolph find a woman who had been strangled in her living room. In Miami, a 65-year-old man is found dead and the only lead is the victim's stolen car.

programme.title: The First 48: Night Out/ One Gram
programme.desc: When a fight at a Charlotte nightclub escalates to gunfire, an innocent bystander is killed in the crossfire. Detective Terry Brandon and his team are forced to pit brother against brother to solve the murder.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 7
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 8

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: The Misery Index: A Brick in the Face
programme.desc: A biking accident of glacial proportions, a real misery who identifies as a wolf, and searching for a cell phone on a trash barge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables

programme.desc: Molly Yeh revisits her can't-miss, retro-inspired dessert recipes. She starts with delicate Italian rainbow cookies and chocolate mint sandwich cookies. There are also red velvet snow balls and giant sprinkle macaroons.

programme.desc: The family is hauling hay in high summer, so Ree Drummond's taking them cool refreshing strawberry cherry lemon limeade and awesome orange bars and demonstrates a slow cooker lasagne and marinated tomatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Meg's Getting Married
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing recipes and stories from an engagement fiesta she hosted for a family friend. She re-creates the Tex-Mex party menu by making out-of-this-world crispy cerveza battered fish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Celebrating Nan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her family are mourning the loss of Ladd's mother so she begins preparing lunch while the family works on tidying the ranch cemetery.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: All About Kids

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Make It Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making things easy with four great recipes. First, there's easy queso to go with pork carnitas that have a shortened cooking time thanks to a multicooker. A humble sheet of foil is the secret to awesome brown sugar ribs.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Yogi Goat
programme.desc: After treating a 'yoga' goat, Dr. Blue brings his best 'namaste' to a herd house call. Dr. Lavigne has his hands full with a trained protection dog who's not a fan of him or the cameras. A party reveals if the Blue's will be adding pink to their family.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pomeranian Plot Twist
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne sees a surprise on an x-ray of one of his favorite patients, while Dr. Ross flexes his exotic vet chops with a fennec fox and a kinkajou with a highly contagious infection. Dr. Blue has his hands full with a former frat house pig named Aubie.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pardon My Frenchie
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne treats a French bulldog with a very vocal breathing problem that requires special surgery, before joining Dr. Blue on a pet pig transport. Dr. Ross has an exam with a 'pig' of his own. Gurgi the guinea pig who is coughing and sneezing.

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Boy Who Spayed Wolf
programme.desc: After a howling fun father-son trip with his boys, Dr. Blue recruits Dr. Ross to tackle two wolf spays at a local sanctuary. Dr. Lavigne performs a bionic surgery on a pit bull with a torn ACL. New vet Dr. Fedke treats a cat with a creepy, crawly injury.

programme.title: The Vet Life: 16-Pound Tumour
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne performs a risky surgery on a loving pit bull with a record-breaking tumour. Dr. Ross examines a rescue pigeon turned pet and an aspiring vet student joins Dr. Blue at Cy-Fair. The doctors deal with a heartbreaking situation at the clinic.

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Tale of Two Tails
programme.desc: Dr. Blue has a crisis on his hands with a dog that has chewed off her own tail, while Dr. Ross treats a reptile that might need a tail amputation. Dr. Lavigne helps Sutter Butter, a cat rescued from being thrown out of a car, and is now having seizures.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: The doctors are on double duty when Dr. Ross brings his daughter into the clinic. A dog is rushed to Dr. Lavigne after suffering multiple seizures and Dr. Blue performs a tricky surgery. The staff must tame a feisty feline patient.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Alpaca-lypse
programme.desc: Dr. Ross goes to surgery when constipation becomes serious for a tegu lizard. Dr. Blue treats a boxer that can barely breathe. The docs help a baby alpaca in distress and are given VIP access to a special event as a thank you.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hermaphrodite Hound
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne does a not so routine surgery on a hermaphrodite dog that's both male and female. A bearded dragon is battling a skin disease that Dr. Ross must treat before it causes serious problems. Dr. Blue manages work and a big family move.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Operation Opera
programme.desc: A frizzle hen is rushed to Dr. Ross after being attacked by a coyote. When a Great Dane mix has a seizure, Dr. Lavigne uncovers multiple issues. A surprise serenade at the clinic musically inspire Dr. Blue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: A Peace Treaty, a Blind Date, and a Divorce No One Understands
programme.desc: Tamra's birthday party for Eddie ends in shambles after an explosive comment is made. Shannon gets set up by a matchmaker and goes on her first date in over twenty years. Vicki fights back about the rumours about her relationship with Steve.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Italian Fight Night
programme.desc: Vicki sets the record straight after Kelly continues to tell stories about Steve to Tamra and Shannon. Gina's parents visit from Long Island to support her with the divorce. Vicki throws an Italian-themed party, complete with a cooking lesson.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: 8 1/2 Minutes of Success
programme.desc: Shannon flies to Philadelphia with daughter Sophie for her first appearance on QVC. Kelly watches her daughter Jolie audition for a musical. Steve takes Vicki on her first ride on a motorcycle. Kelly hosts the ladies for a screening party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Nice to Meet You ... Again
programme.desc: Vicki wants to be a better friend to Gina, but still wonders if Gina is making the right decision on getting divorced. Gina and Emily bond over their inability to get to know Shannon. Vicki is shocked the younger generation doesn't want marriage or kids.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Heat Waves and Hot Flashes
programme.desc: When the OC ladies travel to Jamaica on a girls' trip, the overwhelming heat gets to all of them. Emily and Gina confide in Tamra about Shannon's standoffishness. Shannon gets distracted by her own news from home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Blow up
programme.desc: Tensions rise when Gina confronts Shannon about not being a good friend to Tamra during Eddie's health issues. When Tamra doesn't defend her best friend, Shannon quickly feels betrayed and drama explodes in every direction. Concern grows for Shannon.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: The shop has its hands full restoring a 1942 Ford truck that needed a lot of TLC and a special touch for the owner's wife. Danny and Ryan check out a badass 1929 Ford Roadster, while Gary pulls one over on Mike in the paint shop.

programme.desc: Danny scores a pimp-tastic 1967 Impala, but when it's time to hand over the keys to an important client, Danny doesn't think he can let her go. Meanwhile, Roli does the unthinkable and puts the shop's top project in jeopardy.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Back in Time

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph

programme.title: What on Earth?: Armageddon USA
programme.desc: When the people of a thriving Midwestern town suddenly disappear, they leave behind an eerie ghost town with a dark secret. Experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if the mysterious exodus could be evidence of a freak natural disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Hell Tower NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower are serious engineering emergencies, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Skyscraper vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: A skyscraper sinking into the earth, the world's strongest wall in crisis, and a deadly bridge are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Hellfire USA
programme.desc: A fire in an American town burning since 1962, a massive flood that threatens Chicago's iconic skyscrapers, and a town swallowed by the sea are engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror at Doomsday Dam
programme.desc: When America's tallest dam threatens to burst, a nearby town finds itself an hour away from total annihilation, and engineers use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Super Factories: McLaren Supercar
programme.desc: McLaren's high-tech production center is as remarkably distinctive as the handcrafted automobiles they design and produce, overtaking its supercar rivals through the application of Formula One science and sophisticated production standards.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside the Tesla Gigafactory
programme.desc: Special access to Tesla's record-breaking Gigafactory reveals its bold ambition to build one of the most advanced cars in the world; this cutting-edge facility is one of the world's largest, representing the frontier of engineering innovation.

programme.title: Super Factories: NASA's Rocket Factory
programme.desc: NASA's hi-tech rocket assembly facility pushes the limits of space exploration to new frontiers; here, engineers build an advanced rocket propulsion system that can send astronauts and cargo to the moon and back.

programme.title: Super Factories: Volkswagen Mega Factory
programme.desc: A state-of-the-art Volkswagen factory uses cutting-edge robot technology to produce 750 vehicles every day, and special behind-the-scenes access to the factory floor reveal how this facility is one of the most advanced in the world.

programme.title: Super Factories: Maserati Mega Plant
programme.desc: Maserati takes production of their luxury automotive brand to another level at the Mirafiori facility in Turin, Italy, where the highest standards of materials and manufacturing result in handcrafted cars built on a cutting-edge assembly line.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside UPS Worldport
programme.desc: The UPS Worldport is a distribution powerhouse that connects the world, and special access reveals what happens in the largest automated sorting hub on the planet; with its own fleet of 550 aircraft, it serves more destinations than any other airline.

programme.title: Super Factories: Rolls-Royce Super Engine
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce is not only a legendary automotive brand, but also one of the largest manufacturers of aircraft engines producing the revolutionary Trent XWB, one of the world's most powerful, efficient and eco-friendly jet engines.

programme.title: Super Factories: World's Largest Steel Plant
programme.desc: The largest steel plant in the world is a hi-tech super factory that takes production to astonishing levels, turning out 21 million tons of steel every year on a sprawling campus comprised of 50 individually operating sub-factories.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Body, a Trough, and 800 Pounds of Concrete
programme.desc: Tracy Fortson was the first female deputy sheriff of Oglethorpe County, Georgia. Her life came crashing down when she was convicted of her boyfriend's murder. But her family believes she was framed and want Chris and Fatima to help prove it.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: Reeling from a recent breakup, 23 year-old Jacey McWilliams is down in the dumps until she finds herself smitten with a hot, new man. But just when it looks like they're about to take their relationship to the next level, it runs horrifically off course.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Homicide City: Last Hope
programme.desc: More than two decades after two women are found similarly raped and strangled in North Philadelphia, there's renewed hope that breakthroughs in DNA technology could finally lead detectives to a brutal killer on the loose.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: A Son's Last Kiss
programme.desc: Drew Cato breaks up with his lover and disappears soon after. Police scour the area to no avail, but the plot thickens when they interview his son's mom. As the search drags on, Drew's secrets come to light -- and one of them proves to be deadly.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other in an apartment building become fast friends until becoming sworn enemies. Each enlists their sister as reinforcements in the escalating war between them; a conflict that ends in horrifically shocking violence.

programme.title: Homicide City: Last Hope
programme.desc: More than two decades after two women are found similarly raped and strangled in North Philadelphia, there's renewed hope that breakthroughs in DNA technology could finally lead detectives to a brutal killer on the loose.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: A Son's Last Kiss
programme.desc: Drew Cato breaks up with his lover and disappears soon after. Police scour the area to no avail, but the plot thickens when they interview his son's mom. As the search drags on, Drew's secrets come to light -- and one of them proves to be deadly.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Stranger on the Hill
programme.desc: For college sweethearts Ashley Freeman and Mike Grinnan, a late-night drive to a secluded Texas hill leads to a night of terror and a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: History of Violence
programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder In The Poconos
programme.desc: Benjamin Amato and Cheryl Kunkle's May-December becomes complicated when Cheryl becomes pregnant with the couple's child. The former lovers are soon at war in court. But the day before their final custody hearing, a murder changes everything.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Sometimes, a woman has a killer instinct when she meets her other half. These wicked women exert control over their partners to become the master puppeteer of a murderous plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bury Their Babies
programme.desc: A mother's impulse to love and protect her child is a sentiment hard-wired into the brain, but these deadly women go against the most primal and basic instinct to protect their young.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Vulnerable
programme.desc: A secret addiction drives a young woman to sacrifice her wheelchair bound employer; a scheming caregiver betrays the man who trusts her; and a single mother's desire for a better life leads to a brutal dismemberment.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Family Business
programme.desc: An armored truck driver and his family commit a series of heists, eluding authorities for over a decade. But when one of them starts flashing the cash, their plan for living the good life begins to crumble.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Bright Lights and Betrayal
programme.desc: A film scene being shot on a railroad bridge turns tragic when a train suddenly appears. Was the director responsible for the death of a young crew member? And the mother of a dying child reaches out to celebrities for support. But is her story real?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sister of Survivors
programme.desc: For over 20 years Larry Nassar, once known as the "god-doctor" of U.S. gymnastics, sexually abused young athletes in his care. Finally, one brave survivor broke her silence. Now, a group of women comes together to tell their stories and seek justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Secrets of a Country Store
programme.desc: As the last dry county in the state of Alabama, Clay County is a place stuck in time. When local bootlegger Billy Triplett and his wife turn up dead in the town of Barfield, locals suspect it must have had something to do with his illegal side-business.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Manson
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate/ LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his "Family" of misfit killers. Archival news reports, photos, and interviews paint a searing portrait of 1960s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Waco
programme.desc: A look at the April 19, 1993 FBI raid of a religious compound in Waco, Texas that left seventy-six members of a small, obscure religious cult dead, including twenty-six children.

programme.title: Unabomber
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs, but when his brother David realized who the Unabomber was, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Waco

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades two global superpowers face off, poised for swift and terrible action, threatening to annihilate one another, with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle - and at times, a deadly game. It is the Cold War.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Cold War Hot War
programme.desc: The 60's. The USSR places nuclear warheads in Cuba. The first US troops arrive in Vietnam. The world witnesses one giant leap for mankind. The game is Nuclear Poker, the stakes couldn't be higher.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70s, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive this so-called Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Ninja Framer
programme.desc: Lee brings in a pinch hitter they call the Ninja Framer to get his client's project back on schedule. Derek's crew struggles to work through an infestation of mosquitoes, and Tony discovers an expensive mistake that sends him back to the saw yard.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Missing Helicopter
programme.desc: Lee's crew scrambles to correct a mistake after a mighty framing miscalculation. Tony makes a dangerous call to fix a problem that could destroy his own log cabin. Transport of Derek's ski hut begins, but the helicopter goes missing.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Panic Button
programme.desc: Lee's crew must push through waves of mosquitoes and fatigue to finish the deck of their Bulchitna Lake build before the floatplane arrives to take them home for a day of rest.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Day
programme.desc: Just as Derek and his band of buddies are about to give up on their dream of a cliffside ski hut, Alaska hands them a miracle that turns a down day into game day. Meanwhile, Lee loses one of his hardest working crew members.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Heads Up
programme.desc: The drama at Derek's cliffside build near Valdez escalates after rain saturates the region and an accident on the roof almost takes out a crew member. Tony leaves his build to tend to another job and returns to find an injury has occurred.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Finest Moment
programme.desc: Lee and his crew install a new woodstove to dry out the drywall mud and tape, and while he's waiting, Lee takes time to enjoy everything Alaska has to offer. Meanwhile, Derek and his band of ski buddies race to protect the cabin from bears.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Final Push
programme.desc: Lee is down to a crew of just three as he races to finish the interior of the cabin. Tony's crew discovers a serious miscalculation that will force them to miss their deadline unless a miracle occurs. Derek and his crew push through endless rainfall.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Pennsylvania Charm Meets California Pool House
programme.desc: The team at Heritage Salvage works hard to salvage as much as they can from their biggest brooder barn to date. Back at the shipyard, Bug comes up with a plan to use a hand-hewn beam from a Pennsylvania Amish barn.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Faulty Foundation
programme.desc: A bachelor's dark dining and living room are opened up and become one modern lounge. What was once dirty-carpeted living room with college dorm furniture and a separate ugly dining room gets completely transformed into one hip wine room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Floors, Floors, Floors
programme.desc: Ever closer to finishing up the interior of the Dollar House, Nicole works in the bedrooms to put up all new walls and ceilings as well as remove the black and white linoleum flooring and patch up a burn mark in the hardwood. The staircase is next.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Yellow and Brown Mess
programme.desc: Nicole finds another house in an up and coming neighbourhood that needs her attention. Fighting the onset of colder weather, she must first tackle an exterior makeover, replacing the icky yellow and brown paint job.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Five-Star Foyer
programme.desc: Nicole takes the dark and dim front entryway and opens it up, removing soffits, repairing original stained glass windows, and hunting for salvaged parts to rebuild the fabulous staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Dallas-Fort Worth
programme.desc: It's High Noon in cowboy country for Eddie Hall, as he takes on a monster pancake challenge, a painful rodeo test and local delicacy calves' testes in the world's largest Honky Tonk venue.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Austin

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Tale
programme.desc: Prince Pluto rescues Princess Bella from the clutches of sneaky Wizard Pete.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Clubhouse Rocks
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.title: Elena of Avalor: Flower of Light
programme.desc: When two restless spirits try to disrupt Día de los Muertos, Elena must go to the spirit world to save the holiday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Masquerade
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals help Minnie get ready for her Masquerade Ball before donning their favourite costumes for Professor Von Drake's big Clubhouse Costume Show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Picnic
programme.desc: Minnie along with the help of her friends decides to organize the first picnic of many.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Fancy Dancin' Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy is taught how to act like a gentleman when Clarabelle asks him to go to the Dance.

programme.title: Chuggington: Not from Around Here / My Hero
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Camp Out
programme.desc: In order to earn Clubhouse Camp Out Badges Mickey and his pals pair up with a buddy.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Saving Ayati/ The Crevice
programme.desc: When Ayati loses her balance and falls over, Mazu must come up with a big idea to help! A large crevice rips through the ground and traps the four little dinos in Giganto’s path!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Under One Roof / A Spooky Delivery
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: 221B Barker Street / Leaf It to Puppies
programme.desc: When treats go missing from the Puppy Playcare Halloween party, Bingo and Rolly set off on a mission to solve the mystery. When Bob leaves before he finishes raking, Bingo and Rolly set out to protect the leafy pile.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Lambie Gets the Linties/ Moo-Moo's Tutu Boo Boo
programme.desc: Doc must help Lambie remove the lint from her plush in time for her to be a part of Professor Hootsburgh's plush portrait painting. Then, Moo-Moo accidentally gets ripped when she's left at Doc's house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Mini-Golfin' Guard Pups / Summer Splash Bash
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show / Ticklecrabs / Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Happy Hallowocka! / The Teeth-Chattering Tale of the Haunted Pancakes
programme.desc: During Halloween, Fozzie can't help but be funny when he's supposed to be spooky! When Kermit won't try Miss Nanny's boo-berry pancakes, Summer tells a mysterious Halloween tale.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: an unpredictable, outrageous and hilarious talking pony. No matter the complications he causes, Annie knows that everything is better when Pony is around.

programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star Comes to Earth/ Party With a Pony
programme.desc: Fun-loving magical teen princess, Star Butterfly, who after a few skirmishes with other-worldly monsters, is sent by her Royal Parents to live with the Diaz family on Earth, bringing along her own unique inter-dimensional style to her new planet.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Matchmaker/ School Spirit
programme.desc: In an effort to get a better grade on her math test, Star offers to help her teacher Miss Skullnick with her love life but accidentally turns her into a troll. Star sets booby traps to protect the football team.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Monster Arm/ The Other Exchange Student
programme.desc: When Marco breaks his arm before a big karate tournament, Star tries to fix it with magic but accidentally turns it into a giant tentacle. The Diazes are visited by their charming former exchange student Gustav, and Star quickly becomes jealous.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Cheer Up Star/ Quest Buy
programme.desc: When Star is having a bad day, Marco comes up with a plan to cheer her up. Later, they venture to Quest Bay to purchase a new wand charger before Star's wand dies.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewberty/ Pixtopia
programme.desc: Marco and his friends run up Star’s Magic Mirror bill with prank phone calls, so they all travel to a dimension of pixies to pay it off. Star starts sprouting hearts all over her body, the telltale sign of Mewberty.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Lobster Claws/ Sleep Spells
programme.desc: Ludo fires one of his minions, Lobster Claws, so Marco and Star help him adjust to life on Earth. Marco uses psychology to help Star when she starts using magic in her sleep.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Freeze Day/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: Star accidentally freezes time with her wand, so she and Marco must travel to the Plains of Time to convince Father Time to get back on his time wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: St. Olga's Reform School for Wayward Princesses
programme.desc: To give Pony Head a good birthday, Star must face her greatest fear - going to St. Olga’s Reform School for Wayward Princesses, to bust her out. Once there, Star and Marco find the school is even worse than they thought and their plan won't be easy.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewnipendance Day/ The Banagic Incident
programme.desc: Star leads a battle re-enactment as part of a Mewni Independence Day celebration with her friends on Earth. Then, Star sees a commercial for a magical Earth product and sets off on her own to buy it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart: Inn Love
